EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not remove an interface from a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not add an interface to a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} added an interface to a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} removed an interface from a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
